user_query:
I'm a solo operator running a small ready-to-eat meal prep business and I'm drowning in repetitive admin and compliance tasks. Please read input/process_description.md (how I currently work), input/hazards_seed.md (my draft hazard notes), input/roi_inputs.csv (time/cost for tasks I think could be automated), and input/current_tools.json (what software I'm already using). Then deliver the following under output/:

1) Automation workflow plan: Create output/workflow_spec.yaml that documents a no-code automation design. Include these YAML keys at minimum: rationale (why this design and tool choice category), trigger, conditions, actions (a list with at least 4 sequenced steps), and error_handling (alerts, retries, fallbacks). Keep it vendor-agnostic and include edge-case handling notes.

2) HACCP plan core: Build output/haccp_plan.csv with the header exactly: Step,Biological,Chemical,Physical,Significant,Justification,Control Measure. Include at least these steps as rows: Receiving, Storage, Prep, Cook, Cool, Package, Ship. Also create output/critical_limits.csv with header: CCP,Hazard,Critical Limit,Scientific Basis, and include at least Cold holding (≤41°F/5°C), Hot holding (≥135°F/57°C), Cooling (135°F→70°F in 2hr; 70°F→41°F in 4hr), and Cooking (165°F/74°C for poultry) plus citations (e.g., FDA Food Code references).

3) ROI calculations: Based on input/roi_inputs.csv, calculate for each line item: time_saved_hours_per_month, monthly_value_saved (assume $50/hour), setup_cost ($50 × setup_hours), and payback_months = setup_cost ÷ (monthly_value_saved − tool_monthly_cost). Output an array of objects in output/roi.json with these exact fields: task, minutes_per_task, frequency_per_month, setup_hours, tool_monthly_cost, time_saved_hours_per_month, monthly_value_saved, setup_cost, payback_months. Also write output/roi_summary.md highlighting the top 3 automation opportunities by fastest payback (<3 months) and note any with payback >6 months.

4) Internal multi-role pipeline: Draft output/pipeline.md describing an ongoing, multi-role process to maintain the automations and monitor HACCP logs. Define roles (planner, developer, verifier, tester, reviewer), their responsibilities, handoffs, and success criteria.

5) Maintenance and error plan: Provide output/maintenance.md with a Weekly check section (what to review in logs, HACCP records, and alerts), a Monthly audit section (what to reassess and retire/update), and guidance on error alert routing and escalation.

Acceptance criteria: All specified files exist under output/ with the required headers/keys; workflow_spec.yaml includes rationale, trigger, conditions, actions (≥4), and error_handling; HACCP tables include the requested steps and critical limits with scientific basis; ROI math is consistent with the stated formulas; roi_summary.md correctly lists the fastest payback items (<3 months) and flags slow ones (>6 months); pipeline.md includes the five roles and describes handoffs and success criteria; maintenance.md contains Weekly check and Monthly audit sections and instructions for error alerts.
